lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is blessed with the Naam. ||4||4||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਵਡਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਗ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa vaddaa har bhaag kar paaeaa |
lines.english: The Great Lord is obtained by great good destiny.
I sing His Glorious Praises, and through the Word of His Bani, I speak His Glorious Praises.
As Gurmukh, I chant and recite the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||
Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਇਆ ਅਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap naam man bheaa anandaa |
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Naam, my mind becomes blissful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਰਸਿ ਗਾਏ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sat sat satigur naam dirraaeaa ras gaae gun paramaanandaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has implanted the True Name of the True Lord within me; I sing His Glorious Praises, and taste the supreme ecstasy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਲੋਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai har jan logaa |
lines.english: The humble servants of the Lord sing the Lord's Glorious Praises.
By great good fortune, the detached, absolute Lord is obtained. ||2||
Lacking virtue, the egotistical die, and suffer reincarnation. ||3||
The ocean of the body yields pearls of virtue.
Those without virtue are stained by Maya's filth.
I listen to the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the Naam is pleasing to my mind.
O Nanak, the Gurmukh churns this ocean, and discovers this essence. ||4||5||57||
Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਮੈ ਧਰ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa mai dhar nahee kaaee naam raviaa sabh saas giraasaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, I have no other support; the Naam is woven into all my breaths and morsels of food. ||1||Pause||
Chant the Naam, as Gurmukh, and be exalted.
By great good fortune, the Gurmukh obtains the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਨਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo naam sunaavai so meraa meet sakhaaee |2|
lines.english: One who speaks the Naam - he alone is my friend and companion. ||2||
The Naam illuminates my mind; listening to it, my mind is pleased.
Without the Naam, the fools depart naked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਚਿ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਖੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਪਤੰਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pach pach mue bikh dekh patangaa |3|
lines.english: They burn away to death, chasing the poison of Maya, like the moth chasing the flame. ||3||
The vine of the Lord's Name, Har, Har, has taken root in the Gurmukh.
He Himself establishes, and, having established, disestablishes.
O Nanak, the Lord Himself bestows the Naam. ||4||6||58||
Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਅਨਤ ਤਰੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jap anat tarangaa |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, in endless waves of joy.
It bears the fruit of the Lord; its taste is so tasty! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਕਾਲੁ ਜਮਕੰਕਰ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap naam guramat saalaahee maariaa kaal jamakankar bhueiangaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant and repeat the Naam; through the Guru's Teachings praise the Lord, and slay the horrible serpent of the Messenger of Death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਮਹਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਰਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har gur meh bhagat rakhaaee |
lines.english: The Lord has implanted His devotional worship in the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕੁੰਚਰੁ ਨਾਇ ਖਾਕੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਾਣੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau kunchar naae khaak sir chhaanai |3|
lines.english: He acts like an elephant, who takes a bath, and then throws dust on his head. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਿਛੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai karam kichh bidh nahee jaanai |
lines.english: One who acts in ego, knows nothing about the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਸਿਖ ਦੇਵੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur tutthaa sikh devai mere bhaaee |2|
lines.english: When the Guru is pleased, He bestows it upon His Sikh, O my siblings of Destiny. ||2||
O Nanak, one chants the Naam, the Name of the Immaculate, True Lord. ||4||7||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਵਡ ਭਾਗ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਵਡ ਊਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: je vadd bhaag hoveh vadd aooche |
lines.english: If one's destiny is great and exalted,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਨਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam suniai man tripatai mere bhaaee |1|
lines.english: Hearing the Naam, my mind is satisfied, O my Siblings of Destiny. ||1||
Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਨਿ ਭੂਖ ਲਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam kee man bhookh lagaaee |
lines.english: My mind suffers hunger for the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖਹੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਚੀਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam japahu naame sukh paavahu naam rakhahu guramat man cheetaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Naam, and through the Naam, obtain peace; through the Guru's Teachings, enshrine the Naam in your heart and mind. ||1||Pause||
Chant the Naam, O my friends, O GurSikhs.
Reaping the profit of the Naam, through the Guru's Teachings, my soul has blossomed forth. ||2||
Hearing the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind is in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਿਹਫਲ ਕਰਮ ਕੀਏ ਦੁਖੁ ਧੰਧਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh nihafal karam kee dukh dhandhaa |3|
lines.english: All his actions are fruitless; they lead only to painful entanglements. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਜਪੈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har har jas japai vaddabhaagee |
lines.english: The very fortunate ones chant the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har.
Without the Naam, the mortal is a leper, blinded by emotional attachment.
O Nanak, through the Guru's Teachings, one embraces love for the Naam. ||4||8||60||
